defaultvalue: @SQL=SELECT FIN_Payment_Priority_ID FROM FIN_Payment_Priority WHERE AD_ISORGINCLUDED( (CASE WHEN @#AD_Org_ID@='0' THEN (SELECT ad_org_id FROM ad_org WHERE name = ( SELECT min(o.name) FROM ad_org o join ad_orgtype ot on (o.ad_orgtype_id=ot.ad_orgtype_id) join ad_role_orgaccess ra on (o.ad_org_id=ra.ad_org_id) join ad_role r on (ra.ad_role_id = r.ad_role_id) WHERE ot.istransactionsallowed = 'Y' and r.ad_role_id=@AD_Role_ID@)) ELSE @#AD_Org_ID@ END), AD_Org_ID, @#AD_Client_ID@) <> -1 AND Isdefault = 'Y' ORDER BY Priority
